segments: كَانَ عِنْدَهُ قَوْمٌ يُحَدِّثُهُمْ إِذْ ذَكَرَ رَجُلٌ مِنْهُمْ رَجُلًا فَوَقَعَ فِيهِ وَ شَكَاهُ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ أَنَّى لَكَ بِأَخِيكَ كُلِّهِ وَ أَيُّ الرِّجَالِ الْمُهَذَّبُ .
arabic.text: كَانَ عِنْدَهُ قَوْمٌ يُحَدِّثُهُمْ إِذْ ذَكَرَ رَجُلٌ مِنْهُمْ رَجُلًا فَوَقَعَ فِيهِ وَ شَكَاهُ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ أَنَّى لَكَ بِأَخِيكَ كُلِّهِ وَ أَيُّ الرِّجَالِ الْمُهَذَّبُ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Hajjal, from Sa’alba Bin Maymoun, from the one who mentioned it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘There was a group in his<sup>asws</sup> presence he<sup>asws</sup> was narrating them, when a man from them mentioned a man, and he criticized him and complained of him. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘And what is the matter with you with your brother, (criticizing) all of him? And which of the men is all (completely) free from faults?’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Hajjal, from Sa’alba Bin Maymoun, from the one who mentioned it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘There was a group in his<sup>asws</sup> presence he<sup>asws</sup> was narrating them, when a man from them mentioned a man, and he criticized him and complained of him. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘And what is the matter with you with your brother, (criticizing) all of him? And which of the men is all (completely) free from faults?’.

segments: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Muhammad from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad al-Hajjal from Tha’Labah ibn Maymun from those whom he has mentioned (in his book) from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Once in the presence of abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) there were people speaking to him. One man mentioned the name of another man and he began to criticize him and complained against him. Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) asked, ‘Where from can you have a perfect brother? Who is among man, free and pure of faults and flaws?”’
en.sarwar.text: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Muhammad from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad al-Hajjal from Tha’Labah ibn Maymun from those whom he has mentioned (in his book) from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Once in the presence of abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) there were people speaking to him. One man mentioned the name of another man and he began to criticize him and complained against him. Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) asked, ‘Where from can you have a perfect brother? Who is among man, free and pure of faults and flaws?”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/550)
gradings.label: مرسل
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/550)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَجَّالِ عَنْ ثَعْلَبَةَ بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ عَمَّنْ ذَكَرَهُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا تُفَتِّشِ النَّاسَ فَتَبْقَى بِلَا صَدِيقٍ .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا تُفَتِّشِ النَّاسَ فَتَبْقَى بِلَا صَدِيقٍ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam and Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not investigate the people, for you would remain without a friend’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam and Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not investigate the people, for you would remain without a friend’.

segments: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ali ibn al-Hakam and Muhammad ibn Sinan from, Ali ibn abu Hamza from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Do not be a spy against people; you will remain without friends.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ali ibn al-Hakam and Muhammad ibn Sinan from, Ali ibn abu Hamza from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Do not be a spy against people; you will remain without friends.’”

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ وَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ
